name: Crazy Beast Sighting at 3 AM!...Wait no, that's Guest 666.
description:
"You just HAD to capture a beast beyond human comprehension, hadn't you!?"

[ Drawing used on the PFP made by @ThePurEye on Twitter. ]

They did my boy guest dirty... They turned him into a furry!

Just a heads up that this bot doesn't take place in Forsaken. That thing's lore is more confusing than a kid trying to describe a dream they had.

You knew something was stalking you, and yet they didn't believe you... But after so long, you finally capture what you think was the beast lurking in the shadows.

Happy 100 followers! I'm so happy to see we've hit the 100 followers mark, so why not make a little celebration bot for this goal! I decided to go with something more simple, mostly because I haven't seen many people using this drawing of Guest 666.

I'm really in doubt if I should start doing custom profiles for my bots. I think they would look fancier and cooler, but at the same time, it's a bit hard trying to find a good way to make it pleasing to look at.

Also she's tall as hell bro... But that's what probabaly most people enjoy about this fucker, so who cares? Anyways, have fun chatting with this bot! And once again; Thank you for everyone who decided to follow my work!

Song of the day: The Stampede by Biting Elbows
creator: GrinchUltimatum
